sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7444" key="a)nasbe/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνασβέννῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n7444.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quench, damp,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὁρμάς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.917d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
